plugins.name: n8n-autopilot
plugins.description: Build, validate, and deploy n8n workflows from Claude Code. Requires Node.js 18+ and n8nac CLI ≥ 2.2.0 (auto-installed via npx). Ships init-repo, build-workflow, deploy, pull-schemas, sync-credentials, inventory, data-tables and curated knowledge skills, plus SessionStart hooks for staleness detection with auto-reactions.
